title: Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Reincarnation
altTitles: Mushoku Tensei: Isekai Ittara Honki Dasu
description:
After living a hopeless and isolated life filled with regret, a 34-year-old unemployed man dies in an accident and is reincarnated into a fantasy world as a baby named Rudeus Greyrat. Determined not to waste his second chance, Rudeus decides to seriously live his new life while using the memories and experiences from his previous world to become stronger, wiser, and more confident. Gifted with exceptional magical talent from a young age, he begins learning magic, swordsmanship, and the ways of the world while forming relationships with new friends and mentors.

As Rudeus grows older, he experiences adventure, love, loss, and hardship while traveling across dangerous lands filled with monsters, magic, and political conflicts. Alongside companions such as Sylphiette, Roxy, and Eris, he faces emotional struggles and difficult decisions that slowly shape him into a better person. Combining fantasy adventure, emotional storytelling, character growth, and breathtaking world-building, Mushoku Tensei tells a powerful story about redemption, family, and making the most of a second life.
